Compressivedata.csv.name: Compressivedata.csv
compatibility_reasons: Compressive test dataset with tabular structure.

TensiondataB.csv.name: TensiondataB.csv
compatibility_reasons: Tension time-series: measures tension, not compression. Including as compressive_strength would confuse ensayo type.

Propiedades_Extraidas.csv.name: Propiedades_Extraidas.csv
compatibility_reasons: Propiedades_Extraidas: 69.3% null values. Compressivedata entries (majority of rows) have ALL property columns empty — properties were never extracted from the compressive data. Only TensiondataA entries have numeric values, and those are tensile properties.
